title: 10 best herbal decoctions for oily face
intro_desc: Herbal decoctions for oily face are concentrated liquid extracts made from a combination of herbs, typically including tea tree oil, neem, and witch hazel. These potent brews help to balance the skin's natural pH, reduce sebum production, and calm inflammation, leaving the complexion looking smoother and more refined. For example, a decoction containing chamomile and calendula can soothe redness and irritation, while one with peppermint and lavender can help to tighten pores and reduce acne. By incorporating herbal decoctions into their skincare routine, individuals with oily skin can enjoy improved texture, reduced oiliness, and a more confident complexion.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Germander decoctions helps with oily face because it possesses natural astringent properties that help to dry up excess oil and reduce sebum production. The decoction's antibacterial and antifungal properties also combat acne-causing bacteria, reducing inflammation and redness. Additionally, germander contains antioxidants that soothe and calm the skin, leaving it looking smoother and more even-toned. Regular use of germander decoctions can help to regulate oil production, reduce pores, and leave oily skin feeling clean and refreshed.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Germander's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce redness and swelling associated with acne, making it an effective natural remedy for soothing and calming irritated skin.
Antiseptic: The antiseptic properties of germander decoctions help to prevent the growth of bacteria that can clog pores and cause oily skin, reducing the risk of acne and other skin infections.
Astringent: Germander's astringent properties help to tighten pores and reduce sebum production, leaving skin looking clearer and more even-toned while helping to control excess oil production.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, the roots help to balance sebum production and reduce acne.
Barks: Containing tannins and phenolic acids, the barks have astringent properties that can help to tighten pores and reduce excess oil.
remedy_recipe: Weigh out 20 grams of dried teucrium chamaedrys leaves in a small bowl.
Combine the weighed herb with 500 milliliters of boiling water in a saucepan.
Simmer the mixture for 15 minutes on low heat, then remove from heat source.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container.
Allow the decoction to cool to room temperature before refrigerating and using as a toner.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage decoctions helps with oily face because of its natural antiseptic and astringent properties. The antioxidants present in sage help to reduce inflammation and soothe the skin, thereby controlling oil production. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory compounds in sage help to tighten pores, reducing their appearance and allowing for a smoother complexion. Regular use of sage decoctions can lead to a balanced skin tone, reduced acne, and a decrease in shine, making it an effective natural remedy for oily skin.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial Properties: Sage's antibacterial properties can help reduce the growth of bacteria on the skin, which can contribute to oily skin and acne by preventing pores from becoming clogged.
Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Sage's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce redness and inflammation associated with oily skin, promoting a smoother and more even-toned complexion.

Antioxidant Properties: Sage's antioxidant properties can help neutralize free radicals that can damage the skin and lead to premature aging, acne, and other skin issues, while also protecting the skin from environmental stressors.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce redness and swelling associated with acne-prone skin.
Leaves: Sage leaves contain antioxidants and astringent compounds that can help to balance excess oil production and tighten pores.
remedy_recipe: Measure out 2 teaspoons of dried salvia officinalis leaves into a small bowl.
Pour 250 milliliters of boiling water over the herb in a heat-resistant cup.
Allow the mixture to steep for 5-7 minutes before straining it through a fine-mesh sieve.
Transfer the decoction to a clean glass bottle and store it in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
Use the cooled decoction as a toner, applying it to the face with a cotton pad twice daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: American witch hazel decoctions helps with oily face because of its natural astringent and antiseptic properties. The decoction's ability to tighten pores and reduce excess oil production makes it an effective remedy for controlling shine and balancing skin tone. Additionally, the presence of tannins in witch hazel helps to dry up acne-causing bacteria, reducing inflammation and promoting clearer skin. By incorporating American witch hazel decoctions into one's skincare routine, individuals with oily faces can achieve a healthier, more radiant complexion.
remedy_properties: Tannins: Witch Hazel contains high amounts of tannins, which have an astringent effect on the skin, helping to reduce oil production and tighten pores.
Flavonoids: The flavonoids present in Witch Hazel have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce redness and inflammation associated with acne and oily skin.
Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in Witch Hazel decoctions have antimicrobial properties, which can help to combat bacteria that contribute to oil production and acne.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in tannins, which help to reduce oil production and tighten pores, making it effective in treating oily skin.
Barks: High in astringent properties, which can help to dry up excess oil and minimize the appearance of pores.
remedy_recipe: Measure 2 teaspoons of dried hamamelis virginiana leaves into a small saucepan.
Add 8 ounces of boiling water to the saucepan and let it steep for 10 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh strainer into a clean cup.
Allow the decoction to cool down to room temperature before using it as a toner.
Store any leftover decoction in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm decoctions helps with oily face because of its unique ability to balance and regulate the skin's natural oil production. The antioxidants and flavonoids present in lemon balm work to reduce inflammation, calm pores, and purify the skin, thereby reducing excessive sebum secretion. This gentle and soothing approach also helps to normalize the skin's pH level, leading to a more balanced complexion that is less prone to oiliness.
remedy_properties: Antiseptic and Antibacterial Properties: Lemon balm's antiseptic and antibacterial properties help to reduce acne-causing bacteria on the skin, reducing inflammation and preventing further breakouts.

Astringent and Toning Properties: The astringent and toning properties of lemon balm help to tighten pores, balance oil production, and remove excess sebum from the skin, leaving it feeling smooth and refreshed.
Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Lemon balm's anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and swelling associated with acne and other inflammatory skin conditions.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are used to make decoctions that help balance the skin's natural pH and reduce oil production, making it ideal for oily skin.
Flowers: Lemon balm flowers have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm acne-prone skin, reducing redness and inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Measure out one teaspoon of dried melissa officinalis leaves.
Combine the measured leaves with one cup of boiling distilled water.
Steep the mixture for 10-15 minutes in a heatproof glass container.
Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a clean bowl.
Allow the decoction to cool before storing it in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary decoctions helps with oily face because of its natural astringent and antiseptic properties. The active compounds in rosemary, such as camphor and bornyl acetate, help to balance the skin's natural pH, reducing the production of sebum and tightening pores. As a result, rosemary decoctions can effectively control oiliness, minimizing the appearance of shine and pores, while also helping to purify the skin and prevent breakouts. This makes it an excellent addition to any skincare routine for those struggling with oily skin.
remedy_properties: Antiseptic properties: Rosemary decoctions have antiseptic properties, which help to reduce the growth of bacteria on the skin, thereby preventing breakouts and reducing inflammation associated with oily skin.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Rosemary decoctions possess anti-inflammatory compounds that help to reduce redness and swelling caused by acne and other skin issues often associated with oily skin, leading to a clearer complexion.

Astringent properties: Rosemary decoctions have astringent properties, which help to tighten pores, reducing their appearance and minimizing the production of sebum, thereby controlling oiliness and leaving skin looking smoother.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rosemary roots contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce sebum production and soothe acne-prone skin.
Leaves: Rosemary leaves have antiseptic properties that help combat bacteria and other microorganisms causing oily skin, while also stimulating blood circulation to reduce puffiness.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 tablespoons of fresh rosmarinus officinalis leaves or use dried herb equivalent.
Rinse the harvested leaves in cold water and remove any stems or debris.
Combine the leaves with 8 ounces of boiling distilled water and steep for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container.
Allow the decoction to cool to room temperature before applying it to the face using cotton pads.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild geranium decoctions helps with oily face because of its natural astringent and antibacterial properties, which help to balance the skin's pH level and reduce sebum production. The decoction also contains antioxidants that soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and redness associated with acne-prone skin. Additionally, wild geranium has been shown to tighten pores and reduce their appearance, giving the skin a smoother, more even texture. By using wild geranium decoctions as a toner or mask, individuals can achieve a healthy, balanced complexion.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial properties: Wild geranium decoctions have been shown to exhibit antibacterial activity, which can help reduce the growth of bacteria on the skin that can contribute to oiliness and acne.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The decoction has anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe and calm redness and irritation associated with oily skin, reducing inflammation and promoting a more balanced complexion.
Astringent properties: Wild geranium decoctions have astringent properties that can help tighten pores and reduce the production of sebum, leading to a more even skin tone and reduced oiliness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which help to balance sebum production and reduce acne-causing bacteria on the skin.
Barks: Containing tannins and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can soothe and calm irritated skin.
remedy_recipe: Gather high-quality dried geranium maculatum herbs measuring one teaspoon per cup of water.
Heat filtered water in a saucepan to a rolling boil and then reduce the temperature to a simmer.
Add the dried geranium maculatum herb mixture to the heated water and let it steep for 15 minutes.
Strain the decoction using cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container, discarding the solids.
Allow the cooled decoction to sit at room temperature for two hours before refrigerating or freezing for up to three days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wormwood decoctions helps with oily face because its potent antioxidant properties help to reduce inflammation and excess sebum production. The bitter compounds in wormwood, such as artemisinin and sesquiterpenes, have a natural astringent effect that tightens pores and balances the skin's pH, reducing oiliness and controlling shine. Additionally, wormwood's antimicrobial properties help to combat acne-causing bacteria, leaving the skin looking clearer and more balanced.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Wormwood's antioxidant compounds help neutralize free radicals that can contribute to oil production and inflammation, reducing the appearance of acne and hyperpigmentation.
Anti-inflammatory properties: Wormwood's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with oily skin and acne, promoting a clearer and more balanced complexion.

Antimicrobial properties: Wormwood's antimicrobial compounds combat Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes), the bacteria that can cause acne and other skin issues, helping to prevent breakouts and maintain healthy skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, wormwood roots help to reduce redness and inflammation associated with oily skin.
Buds: Containing a high concentration of essential oils, wormwood buds are effective in balancing sebum production and purifying the skin.
remedy_recipe: Measure one teaspoon of dried artemisia absinthium leaves into a clean glass cup.
Pour one cup of boiling water over the herbs and let it steep for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the liquid using a piece of cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve to remove solids.
Mix equal parts of the decoction with witch hazel in a small bowl.
Apply the cooled mixture to your face using a cotton pad, avoiding eye area for 10-15 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold decoctions helps with oily face because of its natural astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The decoction helps to reduce excess oil production by shrinking pores, controlling sebum secretion, and cleansing the skin deeply. Additionally, its antioxidant compounds help to neutralize free radicals that can cause inflammation and clog pores, leading to a clearer and more balanced complexion. This natural remedy can provide long-lasting results without drying out the skin, making it an effective and gentle solution for oily face concerns.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Calendula's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with oily skin, making it an effective natural treatment for acne-prone skin.
Antimicrobial property: The antimicrobial properties of pot marigold decoctions can help combat bacterial growth that contributes to clogged pores and oily skin, promoting a healthier complexion.

Soothing and calming property: The emollient and soothing compounds in calendula can help calm irritated skin, reducing the appearance of pores and leaving skin feeling smooth and balanced, even in the presence of oil.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, roots help to balance sebum production and reduce acne.
Flowers: Calming and soothing properties of flowers help to reduce redness and inflammation associated with oily skin.
remedy_recipe: Gather one ounce of dried calendula flowers and two cups of filtered water for infusion.
Combine the dried calendula flowers with the filtered water in a heat-resistant glass bowl.
Heat the mixture over low flame or gentle simmer for 15-20 minutes allowing the flavors to infuse.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass bottle discarding the solids.

Store the calendula decoction in the refrigerator and use within three days as a toner or apply it directly to the face twice daily for ten minutes each time allowing skin to absorb the herbal benefits.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Purple coneflower decoctions helps with oily face because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The decoction's ability to calm redness and irritation reduces the appearance of pores, making the skin look smoother and less prone to excess oil production. Additionally, its astringent qualities help to tighten pores, minimizing the release of sebum, while also regulating the skin's natural moisture balance. This results in a more even-toned and balanced complexion, reducing the appearance of oily skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Purple coneflower decoction has anti-inflammatory compounds like cinnamic acid and caffeic acid that help reduce redness, swelling, and inflammation associated with oily skin.

Antimicrobial properties: The decoction contains antimicrobial compounds like phenolic acids and flavonoids that inhibit the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms on the skin's surface, helping to control excess oil production and prevent clogged pores.
Astringent properties: Purple coneflower has astringent compounds like tannins that help tighten and shrink pores, reducing their appearance and minimizing the appearance of oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the purple coneflower contain compounds that help to reduce inflammation and excess sebum production, making them effective in soothing and balancing oily skin.

Flowers: The flowers of the purple conefflower are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that help to calm and regulate the skin's natural oil production, reducing the appearance of pores and leaving skin looking healthy and radiant.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2 tablespoons of fresh echinacea purpurea flowers or 1 tablespoon of dried flowers from reputable sources.
Combine the echinacea flowers with 4 cups of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass measuring cup or teapot.
Steep the mixture for 5-7 minutes to allow the active compounds to infuse into the water.
Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a clean glass container, discarding solids.
Store the cooled decoction in an amber glass bottle at room temperature for up to 24 hours before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion decoctions helps with oily face because it possesses natural astringent properties that help to dry out excess oil, reducing shine and minimizing pores. The diuretic properties of dandelion also help to flush out toxins and impurities from the skin, which can clog pores and cause acne. Additionally, dandelion's anti-inflammatory properties soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with oily skin. By using dandelion decoctions as a face toner, you can achieve a clearer, more balanced complexion.
remedy_properties: Choleretic properties: Dandelion root and leaves stimulate the liver to produce bile, which helps to detoxify the skin and reduce sebum production, leading to a more balanced oil production.

Anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects: The flavonoids, triterpenes, and sesquiterpenes in dandelion have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to soothe acne, reduce redness, and protect the skin from environmental stressors that can exacerbate oily skin.

Lymphatic stimulant and diuretic effects: Dandelion's ability to stimulate lymphatic circulation and increase urine production helps to remove toxins and excess oils from the skin, reducing the appearance of pores and leaving the face feeling cleaner and less greasy.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, dandelion roots can help reduce acne and inflammation on the face.
Leaves: High in vitamins A, C, and K, which can help regulate sebum production and improve skin tone.
remedy_recipe: Weigh accurately 2 tablespoons of dried taraxacum officinale root and add it to a clean glass container.
Boil 4 cups of distilled water in a large pot for 10 minutes to create a strong infusion base.
Transfer the boiling water to the container with the taraxacum officinale root and steep for 20-30 minutes.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into another clean glass container, discarding the solids.
Allow the decoction to cool down to room temperature and store it in an airtight bottle in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat oily face with herbal decoctions is to choose a combination of herbs that balance oil production and reduce sebum secretion. A mixture of neem, tea tree, and lemon balm decoction applied topically helps to purify the skin and control oiliness. Additionally, drinking a warm infusion of turmeric and ginger can help to detoxify the body from within, reducing acne and oil production. Regular use of these herbal remedies can lead to a more balanced and healthy-looking complexion.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to oily face that are treated with herbal decoctions are acne, blackheads, and hyper-pigmentation. Herbal decoctions like those made from neem, turmeric, and tea tree leaves have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation, prevent breakouts, and even out skin tone. These decoctions can also be used to treat other skin issues such as eczema, psoriasis, and rosacea.
